name: @forgeax/remote-demo
description: Remote eval demo — createApp auto-wires app.remote, zero manual assembly. ECS-driven 3-entity spawn mirror of hello-cube with eval channel for handle discovery / read / write.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level; remote-demo bundle is not a baseline anchor

fps.reason: hello-triangle / hello-cube are the established fps anchors; remote-demo is an ECS-driven remote-eval host harness, not a render perf target

bench.reason: remote-demo is an ECS-driven host harness; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

spike-report.reason: spike artefacts live under .forgeax-harness/forgeax-loop/feat-20260629-inspector-two-layer-model/; this app is the host harness consumed by the demo
